info.title: SkyblockGPT Unified Data Gateway
info.description: One compact gateway for Hypixel SkyBlock profiles, inventories, sack counts, resources, Bazaar, auctions, lowest BIN scans, feeds, and player extras.

get.summary: List a player's compact SkyBlock profiles
get.description: Lists profile IDs, cute names, selected state, last save, game mode, and SkyBlock level without returning the full profile payload.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The player's dashed or undashed Minecraft UUID returned by the username lookup action.

get.summary: Get a compact SkyBlock profile summary
get.description: Returns profile identity, SkyBlock level, currencies, fairy souls, calculated skill levels, Slayer data, and a compact Dungeons summary.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The player's dashed or undashed Minecraft UUID returned by the username lookup action.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Optional exact profile ID or cute name. Omit it to use the selected or most recently saved profile.

get.summary: Get one compact SkyBlock profile section
get.description: Returns one compact profile section, including HotM/HotF, Forge processes, skills, counters, gear, and other progression data.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The player's dashed or undashed Minecraft UUID returned by the username lookup action.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Optional exact profile ID or cute name. Omit it to use the selected or most recently saved profile.

parameters.name: section
parameters.description: The profile-data section needed for the current question.

get.description: Returns paginated player collection amounts with official achieved tiers, next-tier requirements, and optional unlocked reward text.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The player's dashed or undashed Minecraft UUID returned by the username lookup action.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Optional exact profile ID or cute name. Omit it to use the selected or most recently saved profile.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Optional collection ID, display name, or category search.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Zero-based result page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Collection entries per response.

parameters.name: include_unlocks
parameters.description: Include official reward text for every achieved tier and the next tier. Use only when recipes or unlocks matter.

get.description: Decodes and paginates the Accessory Bag with item IDs, names, slots, reforges, upgrades, unique counts, and exact duplicate IDs.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The player's dashed or undashed Minecraft UUID returned by the username lookup action.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Optional exact profile ID or cute name. Omit it to use the selected or most recently saved profile.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Optional exact or partial accessory item ID or display-name search.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Zero-based result page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Accessories per response.

get.summary: List every available compressed item container
get.description: Discovers NBT item containers and reports whether numeric sack contents are available without returning oversized inventory data.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The player's dashed or undashed Minecraft UUID.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Optional exact profile ID or cute name.

get.description: Decodes one container returned by the inventory index. Summary supports up to 50 items per page; full data is capped at 5 items per page.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The player's dashed or undashed Minecraft UUID.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Optional exact profile ID or cute name.

parameters.name: container
parameters.description: Exact container ID returned by getCompactSkyBlockInventoryIndex.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Zero-based results page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Requested items per page. Full detail is capped at 5.

parameters.name: detail
parameters.description: Use summary for lists or full for lore, ExtraAttributes, and parsed NBT.

get.summary: Read full parsed data for one item slot
get.description: Returns one item's name, ID, lore, enchantments, attributes, ExtraAttributes, and parsed NBT from a discovered container and slot.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The player's dashed or undashed Minecraft UUID.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Optional exact profile ID or cute name.

parameters.name: container
parameters.description: Exact container ID returned by getCompactSkyBlockInventoryIndex.

parameters.name: slot
parameters.description: Exact item slot returned by the container endpoint.

get.summary: Read item quantities stored in sacks
get.description: Returns the selected member's positive sacks_counts entries with official item names, search, sorting, and pagination. This reads quantities, not merely owned Sack items.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The player's dashed or undashed Minecraft UUID.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Optional exact profile ID or cute name.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Optional item ID or name search within sack contents.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Zero-based result page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Sack item counts per response.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field used to sort matching sack entries.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Ascending or descending sort direction.

get.summary: Read Museum, Garden, or Bingo data
get.description: Returns a response-size-safe Museum inventory, Garden state, or player Bingo history. Museum entries are searchable and paginated.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The player's dashed or undashed Minecraft UUID.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Optional profile ID or cute name for Museum or Garden.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: The player-specific dataset to retrieve.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Optional Museum item search text.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Zero-based Museum result page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Museum entries per page.

get.description: Searches and pages Collections, Skills, or Items, or returns current Election and Bingo resources without exposing oversized raw responses.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: The official Hypixel resource dataset.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Optional item, collection, or skill ID/name search.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Zero-based result page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Results per page.

parameters.name: detail
parameters.description: Summary for lists or full for every available resource field.

get.summary: Read SkyBlock news or Fire Sales
get.description: Returns current official SkyBlock news entries or active and upcoming Fire Sales through the Worker.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: The live feed to retrieve.

get.summary: Search and rank all Bazaar products
get.description: Searches the complete current Hypixel Bazaar snapshot and returns compact prices, volumes, weekly movement, orders, spreads, and pagination.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Optional product ID or display-name search.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Zero-based result page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Products per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field used to rank matching products.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort direction.

get.description: Returns all current Hypixel data for one Bazaar product, including both order summaries, quick status, volumes, prices, orders, and calculated spread.

parameters.name: product
parameters.description: Exact Bazaar product ID from the product-search operation.

get.summary: Browse one current Auction House page
get.description: Filters and sorts one official active-auction page. Its page-scoped lowest BIN is not global; use the direct SkyCofl Action for normal LBin checks.

parameters.name: upstream_page
parameters.description: Zero-based official Hypixel auction page.

parameters.name: result_page
parameters.description: Zero-based page within matches from that official page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Matching auctions per response; full detail is capped at five.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Optional item name, extra text, or auction UUID search within this official page.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Optional exact auction category filter.

parameters.name: tier
parameters.description: Optional exact rarity or tier filter.

parameters.name: bin
parameters.description: Optional BIN-only or auction-only filter.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Keep source order, sort by ending time, or sort price ascending or descending. Omit for automatic BIN ascending order.

parameters.name: detail
parameters.description: Summary for browsing or full for lore, bids, and decoded item NBT.

get.summary: Find the lowest BIN for an exact item
get.description: Resource-safe fallback that scans up to 4 official AH pages and verifies exact item IDs from NBT. Prefer the direct SkyCofl lowest-BIN operation for normal price checks.

parameters.name: item
parameters.description: Exact official SkyBlock item ID or exact official item name.

parameters.name: start_page
parameters.description: First official AH page to scan; begin with zero and continue from next_start_page only when required.

parameters.name: max_pages
parameters.description: Maximum official AH pages scanned in this Action call.

parameters.name: expected_last_updated
parameters.description: For continuation calls, pass the first segment's snapshot_last_updated value to reject mixed AH snapshots.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Cheapest verified matching BIN auctions returned per scan segment.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Optional exact Auction House category filter.

parameters.name: tier
parameters.description: Optional exact rarity or tier filter.

get.summary: Look up auctions by auction, player, or profile
get.description: Looks up official auctions using exactly one auction UUID, player UUID, or profile UUID and returns paginated summaries or full decoded details.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Exact auction UUID. Do not combine with player or profile.

parameters.name: player
parameters.description: Player UUID. Do not combine with uuid or profile.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: SkyBlock profile UUID. Do not combine with uuid or player.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Zero-based result page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Results per page; full detail is capped at five.

parameters.name: detail
parameters.description: Summary or full auction data with decoded NBT.

get.description: Returns compact, paginated auctions from Hypixel's recent-ended window with optional item-NBT decoding.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Optional auction or seller UUID search.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Zero-based result page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Results per page; full detail is capped at five.

parameters.name: detail
parameters.description: Summary or full data with decoded sold-item NBT.

ProxyApiKey.name: X-GPT-Key
ProxyApiKey.description: A private shared secret configured in both the Worker and the Custom GPT Action settings. This is not the Hypixel API key.
